meta.description: Approved local starter catalog for portable text-only guidance packs. Discovery metadata is advisory; preview and import remain separate confirmations.
meta.policy: No executable code, dependency install, MCP server, plugin handler, auto-enable, auto-approve, or one-click execution path.

packs.name: QR Code Creation Guidance
packs.summary: Plan QR code content, safety checks, export format, and validation without generating or executing code.
packs.author: Personal Agent Starter Catalog

packs.name: PDF and Document Conversion Guidance
packs.summary: Plan safe document conversion steps, input checks, formatting choices, and verification before any file action.
packs.author: Personal Agent Starter Catalog

packs.name: Image Editing Workflow Guidance
packs.summary: Turn image-editing requests into a clear, reviewable workflow without invoking image tools.
packs.author: Personal Agent Starter Catalog

packs.name: Browser Automation Planning Guidance
packs.summary: Design browser automation plans, selectors, risks, and dry-run checks without controlling a browser.
packs.author: Personal Agent Starter Catalog

packs.name: Linux Troubleshooting Workflow
packs.summary: Structure Linux diagnostics, evidence collection, and rollback-safe repair plans before commands are run.
packs.author: Personal Agent Starter Catalog

packs.name: File Organization Workflow
packs.summary: Plan file organization, naming, deduplication, and dry-run review before any filesystem mutation.
packs.author: Personal Agent Starter Catalog

packs.name: Writing and Editing Workflow
packs.summary: Guide drafting, rewriting, critique, tone, and editing passes for text work.
packs.author: Personal Agent Starter Catalog

packs.name: Project and Code Audit Workflow
packs.summary: Plan repository audits focused on risks, tests, maintainability, and user-facing behavior.
packs.author: Personal Agent Starter Catalog
